title: Polished Vanilla
description: A vanilla+ mod focused on overhauling the game without making it feel "un-mincrafty".
body:
### A vanilla+ modpack overhauling world-gen, QOF, and exploration mechanics.



## World gen
Worlds are now continental, with vast oceans separating different continents with occasional islands, with a few new biomes to explore.

![The new continental type of world](https://i.imgur.com/XtuFpSg.png)  



![A new, nicer kind of river](https://i.imgur.com/9blIc3c.jpeg)


## QOF
Press 'm' for a hand drawn map
![The new hand drawn style map](https://i.imgur.com/32C7YFJ.png)

Bedrock-like bridging

![A demonstration of the new bridging](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExaTJnMm90djZkMnJnN2NnaTl0OHhvNXBkaWU5N3oxNGVtdWp4emVreCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/4euC7Zi7RDEasJ1RFa/giphy.gif)
## Exploration
The elytra has been nerfed to make other modes of transport viable

![A screenshot of me riding a horse](https://i.imgur.com/FIxREII.jpeg)

New villages and structures

![A new type of village](https://i.imgur.com/9IhhPRZ.jpeg)
